---
title: "Selected Code & Reproducible Research"
editor:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

## Public Repositories

Selected repositories will be added after code cleaning and documentation.

## Technical Skills Demonstrated

- Python geospatial data processing with GDAL, Rasterio, NumPy, Pandas, and scikit-learn.
- Remote sensing product preprocessing and batch automation.
- Machine learning for wildfire risk modeling.
- Explainable AI with SHAP / GeoShapley.
- Deep learning for remote sensing image classification with PyTorch.
- Google Earth Engine JavaScript for geospatial analysis.

## Code Availability

Code and data for the wildfire modeling project will be made available upon reasonable request or after publication, subject to data-sharing and publication policies.

Company source code, internal system details, client information, private data paths, and uncleaned research code are not disclosed on this website.
